title: Archive Downloader
description: Download and use the latest redstone contraptions made by the Storage Catalog community and other archives
body:
![UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed2860c8c4835808246b57bcd7ca6448c4ee516_0.webp)

**Previously known as ST2-Downloader**

Get the latest technical Minecraft contraptions without leaving your game! Browse schematics, world downloads, and more!

Storage Catalog is a community-run organization dedicated to the development of new storage technologies in Minecraft. Join our community of experienced players to learn more about how you can design your own advanced storage!

Browse designs on our website:
https://storagecatalog.org/

Or join our Discord to play on the public CMP and submit your own designs:
https://discord.gg/hztJMTsx2m

## How to use
Press "N" (keybind configurable in your game options) to open the interface. Alternatively, if you have [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica), you can open the Litematica mod menu and click on the "Archive Browser" button added there. Afterwards, click on "Filters" and select what you're interested in

![filters](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ef028c7161ee3b43fd5541af7056abc264857f4_0.webp)

Click on a post, then scroll down to see what's available

![post example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98f846c0844888c088ac538b086e9a8f45399249_0.webp)

Click on any file to download! This mod mainly supports two kinds of files:

- Litematic files are schematics used by the [Litematica mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica). If you have it installed this mod will auto-load the schematic placement for you!
- World downloads (WorldDL or WDLs) are save files containing typically more larger and complex builds. This mod will automatically unzip and put the saves in your saves folder, so you can open it in singleplayer immediately.

That's not all! You can click on the "Storage Catalog" button in the top left corner to view other Technical Minecraft archives using the Llama archiving system!

![other archives](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/008937946b90a9ab8b9808d917ad293d28c91411.png)

## Recommended Litematica Settings
- datafixerMode: Set to Always to ensure that schematics from older versions are loaded with inventories correctly.
- entityDataSync and pasteUsingServux: Set both to true so that you can paste instantly with inventories on servers using the [Servux mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/servux).
